title: Verify trial corner widget displays for Day 0-1 trial users
description: Test that the persistent homepage widget displays correctly for users on Day 0 or Day 1 of their trial with remaining days counter
preconditions: User has activated a trial within last 24 hours

steps.description: 1. Create user account with trial activated
2. Navigate to homepage within 24 hours of trial activation

expected_result: Widget displays with shield/clock icon showing 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining' and links to manage control center
